settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure application and service settings
settings.advancedDesc: Configure complex health checks, legacy protocol support, and network tunneling for secure environments.
settings.discardConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel?

alerts.title: Alert Configuration
alerts.descriptionAlerts: Configure notification channels and alert rules

security.title: Security & Access
security.descriptionSecurity: Manage security policies and access controls
security.subtitle: Monitor security events and threats across your infrastructure

protocols.title: Protocol Selection
protocols.description: Select the underlying transport protocol used for active health probes. gRPC and ICMP are optimized for backend-to-backend communication.

proxy.title: Proxy & Tunneling
proxy.enabledMsg: Tunneling is enabled. All health checks will be routed through the secure gateway. Latency metrics will include the tunnel overhead.

editor.title: Payload Scripting
editor.validated: Script validated - No syntax errors found.

help.title: Need Help?
help.desc: Legacy protocols require specific cipher suites. Check our documentation for compatibility tables.

interface.title: Interface
interface.subtitle: Language, theme, and timezone preferences
interface.timezoneDesc: Timezone used for date and time display

checkDefaults.title: Check Defaults
checkDefaults.subtitle: Default values applied when creating a new service
checkDefaults.intervalDesc: Default health check interval for new services (seconds)
checkDefaults.intervalError: Interval must be at least 1 second
checkDefaults.timeoutDesc: Default response wait time for new services (milliseconds)

alertThreshold.title: Alert Threshold
alertThreshold.subtitle: Conditions for sending alerts
alertThreshold.consecutiveFailuresDesc: Number of consecutive failures before sending an alert

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.subtitle: Retention periods for metrics and log data
retention.metricsDesc: How long to keep collected system metrics
retention.logsDesc: How long to keep error log data

accountReset.title: Account Reset
accountReset.subtitle: Delete the admin account and return to first-run setup
accountReset.confirmDesc: All account data will be deleted and you will need to create a new account. This action cannot be undone.
accountReset.success: Account has been reset. Please set up a new account.
accountReset.demoNotice: Account reset is not available in demo mode.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: Export service configuration and API information
dataManagement.exportServicesDesc: Download all current service configurations as a JSON file
